graded_findings.rationale: The gather finding says this new design spec was updated appropriately and documents the added dscli status behavior. This is not an adherence gap.
The gather finding says this new implementation plan was updated appropriately and tracks the relevant implementation and validation work. This is not an adherence gap.
The canonical dscli user reference remains unchanged while the PR adds a user-facing dscli status command. That omission leaves published command documentation incomplete and should block merge.
